name: Tether USDT Bridged ZED20
description: USDT.z is a next-generation BEP-20 utility token designed to operate as a core liquidity and infrastructure asset within a scalable decentralized financial ecosystem on BNB Smart Chain. The protocol leverages high-throughput architecture, EVM compatibility, and low-fee settlement to enable efficient trading, seamless integration with DeFi protocols, and rapid ecosystem expansion. The project focuses on three primary verticals: a proprietary decentralized exchange (USDT.z Swap), on-chain utility for Web3 applications and gaming, and future cross-chain interoperability. All components are developed with a security-first approach, transparent tokenomics, and a sustainable long-term growth model.
